title: Inter-School Tournament for SCHOOL OF POLYTECHNIC
content: Inter-School Tournament for SCHOOL OF POLYTECHNIC Event Date: 25th November 2022 Galgotias University sports department conducted Galgotias Sports Fest for students across the India. The information regarding tournament for the event was shared through social media for example Instagram and WhatsApp along with link for registration for the tournament. Mentor Name - Prashant Bharadwaj, Yusuf Ahmed, Bhupinder Lingwal Department Name – Galgotias Sports Department
